prompt_inputs.goal: marathon endurance training with carbohydrate loading

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one full day with appropriate timing for pre/during/post-training energy availability
Total daily calories and carbohydrate intake support high-endurance marathon training demands
Plan is compact and concise (brief descriptions, not elaborate recipes)
task_description: Write a compact, consise 1 day meal plan for a single Athelete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high caloric intake and carbohydrate loading, with specific timing for energy availability

solution_criteria: Meal plan spans exactly 1 day with all meals specified
Protein distributed across minimum 4 meals with pre/post-workout nutrition clearly identified
Caloric and macronutrient targets appropriate for 85kg strength athlete in muscle gain phase
Format is compact and concise (under 400 tokens)
task_description: Write a compact, consise 1 day meal plan for a single Athelete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) emphasizing protein distribution across meals and pre/post-workout nutrition with minimal cardio demands

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains 4-5 meals/snacks distributed throughout the day
All protein sources are plant-based (legumes, tofu, nuts, seeds, grains)
Caloric and macronutrient distribution supports muscle gain and endurance (approximately 2800-3000 calories with 1.6-2g protein per kg bodyweight)
Includes micronutrient-rich foods addressing vegan athlete needs (iron, B12, omega-3, calcium)
task_description: Write a compact, consise 1 day meal plan for a single Athelete
scenario: Testing with an athlete with dietary restrictions (vegan/vegetarian) requiring plant-based protein sources and balanced micronutrient planning for recovery
